name: Essay Thesis-Evidence (7-section)
summary: Seven-section narrative arc for argumentative video essays: Hook → Context → Thesis → Evidence (×N, default 3) → Conclusion. Pacing arcs from fast (Hook) through standard (body) to slow (Conclusion). Evidence sections are parameterized — pick N from the script's argument structure. Pairs naturally with the 'essay-doc-explainer-v1' style template.
